failure_asset.hypothesis_tested: fold-local intraday seasonal residual dislocation rank over prior-observation time-of-day residual range, volume, spread, return, cumulative range, cumulative volume, and day-return progress anomalies
failure_asset.next_boundary: do not retry this intraday seasonal residual dislocation surface with simple score thresholds, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or retry nudges; choose a materially new C0034 major hypothesis axis
failure_asset.reason_not_candidate: proxy was negative, aggregate MT5 tick was negative, and all nine fold-isolated MT5 tick folds lost; worst fold rw_005 net PnL was -79.32 with max drawdown 15.864 percent

supporting_lessons.summary: intraday seasonal residual dislocation rank met target activity but lost all nine rolling-window OOS folds; total tick net PnL was -436.42 and worst fold rw_005 net PnL was -79.32
schedule replay logic parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so failure is not a proxy-to-EA schedule mismatch
tick execution was better than closed-bar logic in all nine folds, for +61.69 total tick-minus-logic net PnL; execution differences did not rescue candidate quality

hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: closed-bar intraday seasonal residual dislocation surface over prior-observation time-of-day expected range, volume, spread, return, cumulative range, cumulative volume, and day-return progress residuals; not C0032 tail-risk skew, C0031 entropy release, C0030 VWAP repricing, C0024 calendar phase rhythm, C0021 daily profile energy, C0012 session auction rotation, threshold, score, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or retry nudge

notes: MT5 validation remains required even if proxy KPI is weak.

pre_open_decision.adjacent_tuning_rejection_reason: Changes the major hypothesis from tail-risk skew, entropy, VWAP, calendar rhythm, and daily profile surfaces to time-of-day seasonal residual dislocation; it is not a threshold, score, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or retry nudge.
pre_open_decision.true_variant_summary: Tests prior-observation time-of-day seasonal residual dislocations as a new C0033 campaign surface with mandatory schedule-replay MT5 pairing.

notes: Proxy output is reference evidence and cannot stop MT5 validation.
